title: Mace Mayhem
description: Remolded mace, your enemies will cower before you...
body:
# Mace Mayhem

The mace isn't big enough for for how powerfull it is, 
so this pack changes that.
With Mace Mayhem installed, the mace will now resemble an axe/mace/hammer hybrid, complete with a handle wrapping that resembles a sheet of wind.
Even in your hand this weapon of mass destruction if three times as large as it was.
See the gallery for images.

If you enjoy what I do, consider supporting me on Ko-fi! Every little bit means a lot https://ko-fi.com/limeimortal

Also: for anyone wanting a custom pack made for them; also send a dm to Lime_void on the Imortals Packs discord with your specific suggestion, your reason (if you have one) and a colour pallet if you want, a size, a name (optional) and what mod (or base minecraft) it should be for within.
